queries.compiledQueryString:
select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
queries.inputQueryString:
select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    voter_count
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('${inputs.state_filter.value}', '') = '' or state = '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
order by state, age_group, party
queries.inputQueryString:
select
    state,
    age_group,
    party,
    voter_count
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('${inputs.state_filter.value}', '') = '' or state = '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
order by state, age_group, party

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    state,
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('${inputs.state_filter.value}', '') = '' or state = '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
group by state, party
order by state, party
queries.inputQueryString:
select
    state,
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('${inputs.state_filter.value}', '') = '' or state = '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
group by state, party
order by state, party

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    party,
    sum(voter_count) as total_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where coalesce('${inputs.state_filter.value}', '') = '' or state = '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
group by party
order by total_voters desc
